all match C 5n 4n

7 I 1

Applying to 11111110
Input
I 0 = 1
I 1 = 1
I 2 = 1
I 3 = 1
I 4 = 1
I 5 = 1
I 6 = 1
I 7 = 0
Output
0 I 4 = 1
1 I 5 = 1
2 I 6 = 1
3 I 7 = 0
4 C 4n = NOT(1) = 0
5 C 5n = NOT(1) = 0
6 I 0 = 1
7 I 1 = 1

\boxed{11100011}
